angles.name: Lionel Richie Birthday
angles.copy: Lionel Richie turns 77 today, the legendary voice behind hits like 'All Night Long' and 'Hello', get ready to sing along to his greatest hits on Nation 80s

angles.name: Cyndi Lauper Birthday
angles.copy: Cyndi Lauper turns 73 today, the iconic voice behind 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', tune in to Nation 80s for her greatest hits

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: George Michael would have celebrated his 63rd birthday

angles.name: George Michael Tribute
angles.copy: Today would have been George Michael's 63rd birthday, we remember the legendary voice behind Wham! and his solo hits, tune in to Nation 80s for a tribute

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Michael Jackson's death

angles.name: Michael Jackson Tribute
angles.copy: Today we remember the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, on the anniversary of his death, tune in to Nation 80s for his greatest hits

angles.name: Ringo Starr Birthday
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86 today, the legendary drummer of The Beatles, tune in to Nation 60s for his greatest hits with the Fab Four

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Brian May turns 79 today, the legendary guitarist of Queen, tune in to Nation Rocks for their greatest hits

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83 today, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, tune in to Nation Rocks for their greatest hits

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: MTV launched 47 years ago, revolutionizing music television with its first video 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles, tune in to Nation 80s for the best of the 80s

events.title: Oasis release Definately Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released Definately Maybe 32 years ago

angles.name: Oasis Definately Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Oasis released their debut album Definately Maybe 32 years ago, a game-changer in the Britpop era, tune in to Nation 90s for the best of Oasis

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place

angles.copy: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, a pivotal moment in music history, tune in to Nation 60s for the best of the 60s

events.title: Anniversary Of Elvis' Death

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Today we remember the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his death, tune in to Nation 60s for his greatest hits

events.blurb: Tupak Shakur was shot dead in Las Vegas 30 years ago

angles.name: Tupak Shakur Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Tupak Shakur was shot dead in Las Vegas 30 years ago, a tragic loss for the music world, tune in to Nation 90s for his greatest hits

angles.copy: The Beatles released Abbey Road 57 years ago, one of the most iconic albums in music history, tune in to Nation 60s for the best of The Beatles

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, the iconic voice of The Pretenders, tune in to Nation 80s for their greatest hits

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine

angles.copy: John Lennon released Imagine 51 years ago, a powerful and enduring album, tune in to Nation 70s for the best of John Lennon

angles.copy: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago, revolutionizing the way we listen to music, tune in for a special feature on the impact of the iPod

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day, tune in for a special feature on the music of Bond, from Shirley Bassey to Adele
